Min bedstemors hud så glattere ud som 80-årig end min gjorde som 50-årig. Jeg tryglede hende om hemmeligheden. Hun smilede, trak en lille krukke frem og sagde: "Bare ALOE VERA og RICINUSOLIE. Hver aften, ingen undskyldninger." Jeg fulgte hendes eksempel. Tre uger senere kiggede en kassemedarbejder på mit ID og lo – "Du er ikke i den alder!" Jeg blinkede bare og sagde …

sharedPost.text:
🚨 CASTING CALL: Be Part of a Story That Changes Eternities! 🚨
Are you ready to use your acting talent for a greater, divine purpose?

Church House Productions is casting for our upcoming powerful episode of The Rapture Chronicles. This isn’t just another film project—it is a visual wake-up call and a ministry tool designed to shake hearts, reach lost souls for Jesus, and open eyes to the distractions and traps of this world that pull people away from God.

We are bringing to life a breathtaking, cinematic illustration of just how fast the Rapture could happen. We need passionate individuals to help us deliver this urgent message!

🎬 ROLES AVAILABLE (Non-Paid Opportunity):
3 Female Leads (Diverse Races)

1 Male Supporting Role

Background Extras (20–30 participants needed to bring the chaotic, pivotal moments to life!)
Incentives: IMDb Credit for speaking roles and End Credits for all participants.
Filming Dates: Detroit, MI. Metro Area in Mid-June 2026.

⚡ "Your role is already written. Will you heed the warning?"
If you have a heart for ministry, a passion for the screen, and want to help us plant seeds of faith that will last for eternity, we want to see your audition!

📩 HOW TO APPLY:
Don't wait—time is of the essence. Email us at churchouseproductions22@gmail.com today to receive full details for video auditions. Please specify the role you are interested in within the email subject line.
Let's use the arts to win souls for the Kingdom. Apply now!

items.title: It’s casting call time!

items.text:
CVS Health Services Customers Testimonial Casting
[[https://cvs.castingcrane.com/](https://cvs.castingcrane.com/)](https://cvs.castingcrane.com/)
* Has CVS had a significant, positive impact on your health / life?
* Do you regularly visit CVS Pharmacy, MinuteClinic, Specialty Pharmacy, or CVS Retail?
* Have you benefited from any CVS health services such as pharmacy deliveries, Minute Clinic mental health services, women's health services, etc?
* Do you have a story of how CVS has helped you along your health journey?

If you answered "yes" to any of these questions, then we want to hear from you! *(All selected talent will be compensated.)*

CVS and Edelman are looking for real people across the country to share their stories on how the different CVS health services have played an important, emotional, or memorable role in their health journey. These empowering testimonial videos will share stories of how CVS, CVS Pharmacy, Signify Health, MinuteClinic, CVS Specialty Pharmacy, etc. have helped everyone from college students to caregivers to cancer survivors to people who just love CVS. Whether you shop at CVS regularly, have visited the MinuteClinic, relied on the Specialty Pharmacy, or benefited from preventive screenings offered at a CVS location - we want to hear from you. 

*Selected candidates will take part in a filmed interview in late May / early June, where they will discuss how CVS is a part of their life.*

**If you are interested in being considered for this project, please fill out our casting application at **[[https://cvs.castingcrane.com/](https://cvs.castingcrane.com/)](https://cvs.castingcrane.com/)** or email us directly at casting@pairedupmedia.com**

Do you regularly visit CVS Pharmacy, MinuteClinic, Specialty Pharmacy, or CVS Retail? Have you benefited from any of the many health services offered through CVS? If you answered "YES" to any of these questions, we want to hear from you! CASTING@PAIREDUPMEDIA.COM PAIRED + UP MEDIA'

AUDITION NOTICE !! - TRUE WEST
Playbox Productions is excited to announce:

**TRUE WEST**
**by Sam Shepard**

Directed by **Samuel G.C. Muñoz**

**IN-PERSON AUDITIONS:**
Sunday, June 14, 2026
Starting at 9:00AM

**LOCATION:**
2820 Smallman Street
Pittsburgh, PA 15222

**AUDITION REQUIREMENTS:**
• Prepare TWO contrasting 1-minute monologues (Dark comedy preferred)
• Bring headshot & resume

**CALLBACKS:**
Wednesday, June 17 at 10:00AM
(Same location)
*Please make sure you are available for callbacks if auditioning.

**NOTE:** To be considered, you MUST:
• Fill out the Google Form (Link in Bio)
• Book an audition slot through the True West Auditions page link
If you do not reserve a time-slot, you will NOT have an audition appointment.

**PERFORMANCE DATES:**
September 24 – October 4, 2026
(10 Performances Over Two Weekends)

**Three Stories Theater**
937 Liberty Ave
Pittsburgh, PA

**COMPENSATION:**
All roles are paid. Stipends provided. (based on overall production performance) 

**Questions or scheduling conflicts?**
Email: playboxpgh@gmail.com
https://playboxproductions.com

**NOTE:** We are still looking for a few Stage Management production members to join the team, if that is any interest to you please email us ASAP: **playboxpgh@gmail.com**

**Tickets @** https://playbox.ticketspice.com/true-west

Presented by PLAYBOX Productions in partnership with the Pittsburgh Cultural Trust.

It’s not just an audition — it’s your invite to be part of something exciting, to share the spotlight with other amazing performers, and to create memories that will last forever. 🌟

items.text: Looking to cast  a young hispanic looking boy actor with curly hair for a film. Ages 7-11. Must look 8-9 years old. Shoot will take place Monday June 1st and Tuesday June 2nd. Pays $125 a day. Great role.Must be good with lines. Shoot will take place in St. James, Long Island. Please email saintprayerthemovie@gmail.com. For union and non-union actors.

sharedPost.text:
Note to those who cast actors:
What Actors Actually Do When You Give Them 48 Hours

We talk a lot in this industry about “quick turnarounds” and “self-tape in 24 hours.” What doesn’t get talked about enough is what that actually requires from the actor on the other end.

I recently had a casting opportunity with a 48-hour turnaround. Here’s what went into saying yes:

1. Rearranging real life
I cancelled plans with family to make sure I understood the character and learnt the sides properly. Half-prepared work helps no one.

2. Clearing the schedule  
I spent the next day reorganising commitments for the shoot days and put other work on hold in case I got the role. That’s standard practice if you want to be professional and available.

3. Treating it like the job it is
Even at the audition stage, this is time, focus, and energy. Actors invest it upfront because we know that’s what it takes to do the work justice.

I share this not to complain, but to give context. When casting teams move fast, it’s appreciated. But communication matters.

On this occasion, I found out 5 hours before my Zoom audition that they’d changed their mind and gone with another actor. After rearranging my week to be available, that felt disrespectful to the process and the time already invested.

How you handle that process tells actors a lot about what it would be like to work with you. For me, professionalism goes both ways. I’ll always respect tight timelines and do the work to meet them. In return, I look for the same respect for the process and the people in it.

The industry runs on relationships. How we treat each other in the small moments is what determines whether people want to work together again.

#casting #castingcalls #castingdirector #producer #producerlife #production
#UKCasting #LondonActors #ManchesterActors
#BritishTV #UKFilmIndustry
#EquityUK #SpotlightActors #CastingNetwork

𝗡𝗲𝘄 𝗮𝘁 𝗕𝗼𝗱𝘆𝗺𝗶𝗻𝗱 𝗧𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗮𝗽𝘆 𝗕𝗲𝗿𝗹𝗶𝗻: Belly Massage for Women & FLINTA*
​
The belly is one of the most emotionally and physically charged areas of the body — connected to stress, digestion, menstruation, hormones, emotions, vulnerability, and nervous system regulation.
​
Yet it’s also an area many people disconnect from, tense, hide, or ignore.
​
This treatment focuses exactly there: through integrative bodywork, belly massage, and nervous system-focused touch.
​
A powerful journey back to your center.
​
📍 In Berlin-Kreuzberg
​
→ 𝗟𝗲𝗮𝗿𝗻 𝗺𝗼𝗿𝗲:
https://www.bodymindtherapy.de/en/integrative-bodywork-frauen-in-berlin
.
.
.
​
#bellymassage #abdominalmassage #womensbodywork #flintabodywork #massageberlin #bodyworkberlin #berlinkreuzberg #nervoussystemregulation

items.text:
📸 Suche Fotografen & Videografen! Offen für alle Arten von Shootings 🎥
Hi! Ich bin auf der Suche nach Kooperationen und offen für absolut jedes Format: Foto, Video, kreative Projekte oder kommerzielle Werbedrehs.

Kurz vorab: Ich bin kein Runway-Model mit Modelmaßen. Ich bin eine ganz normale Frau mit einem natürlichen Look, aber super motiviert, mich in verschiedensten Stilen auszuprobieren и neue Looks umzusetzen.

Ich bin zeitlich extrem flexibel, fast immer verfügbar und spontan einsatzbereit. Wenn ihr ein Gesicht für euer Projekt sucht oder kurzfristig jemanden vor der Kamera braucht — schreibt mir einfach, ich bin für jeden Spaß zu haben!

📍 Location: Berlin (und Umgebung).

📩 Schreibt mir gerne eine private Nachricht, ich freue mich auf eure Ideen!

items.text:
Theater ist mehr als ein Ort. Es sind Begegnungen, Augenblicke und Geschichten … ✨

Wir freuen uns in diesem Jahr Alexandra Kamp mit dabei zu haben. Sie spielt die Rolle des Guten Gesell. In Bremen spielt Marie Zielcke den guten Gesellen.

Informationen & Tickets:
www.jedermann-theater.de

items.text:
***Looking for a male actor under 4'9" for the leading role in an upcoming high school sports comedy student short film! No prior acting experience necessary.***

**Logline:** When a popular basketball star steals the one thing that made him special, a short-statured outsider joins the team to prove he can out-dunk the tallest kid in school.

**Genre: **Sports Comedy

**Length: **13-17 mins

**Estimated Shoot dates**: Minimum seven days, likely all in November 2026. 

**Location**: Denver or Aurora, CO

If you're interested, kindly email jakewunger@gmail.com with 2-3 pictures of yourself (one full body and one that clearly shows your face, no hat or sunglasses) as well as height measurements, and your resume if you'd like!

In case you missed Season 6…check it out!  Make sure to follow Kick Ass Film Fest to stay up to date with our next Season. 

www.kickassfilmfest.com

sharedPost.text:
The official recap video is officially live! We want to extend a huge thank you to everyone who made this chapter of the Kick Ass Film Fest our best one yet. To our filmmakers, supporters, sponsors, family, and friends: thank you for your endless passion and dedication. We love seeing the immense growth of the Colorado film community and are incredibly excited for what the future holds.

A special thank you goes to Tyler Shown and David Armenta for their fantastic work behind the camera, filming the magic of the night and capturing our interviews. We also want to give a shout-out to the phenomenal team at Pueblo Memorial Hall for being so awesome and helping us keep the evening flowing flawlessly, as well as our kick-ass MC, Nova Meets, for keeping the crowd hyped from start to finish.

Check out the full recap video below! Plus, the excitement doesn't stop here—those red carpet interviews captured by Tyler and David will be rolling out throughout the summer, so be sure to follow us across all platforms to catch them as they drop.

www.kickassfilmfest.com
